title: Prior Authorization From Your Insurance | Health Insurance 101 | GoodRx
description:
Doctors have to contact insurance providers before performing certain medical treatments. This ensures that the doctor and the insurer agree that the treatment is “medically necessary.” Prior authorization reduces the risk that the insurer will deny the claim, which is the request for payment after you receive medical care. This video breaks down prior authorization and how it affects you.
